name: ClawShield
description: Safety hooks for OpenClaw: embedded TypeScript SafetyCore with enforced tool param replacement/blocking and tool_result_persist hook-once subprocess.

failClosed.description: If true, block tool calls when evaluation fails or throws. If false, allow (default: true).

enablePromptContextEval.description: Run SafetyCore on before_prompt_build payload (default: true).

persistEvalTimeoutMs.description: Max milliseconds to wait for tool_result_persist hook-once subprocess (default: 120000).
